text: vyhy bymy shft hshftym vyhy r'b b'rts vylkh 'ysh mbyt lchm yhvdh lgvr bshdy mv'b hv' v'shtv vshny bnyv
vshm h'ysh 'lymlkh vshm 'shtv n'my vshm shny-bnyv  mchlvn vkhlyvn 'frtym mbyt lchm yhvdh vyb'v shdy-mv'b vyhyv-shm
vymt 'lymlkh 'ysh n'my vtsh'r hy' vshny bnyh
vysh'v lhm nshym m'byvt shm h'cht 'rfh vshm hshnyt rvt vyshbv shm kh'shr shnym
vymvtv gm-shnyhm mchlvn vkhlyvn vtsh'r h'shh mshny yldyh vm'yshh
vtqm hy' vkhltyh vtshb mshdy mv'b khy shm'h bshdh mv'b khy-fqd yhvh 't-'mv ltt lhm lchm
vtts' mn-hmqvm 'shr hyth-shmh vshty khltyh 'mh vtlkhnh bdrkh lshvb 'l-'rts yhvdh
vt'mr n'my lshty khltyh lkhnh shbnh 'shh lbyt 'mh [y'shh kh] (y'sh q) yhvh 'mkhm chsd kh'shr 'shytm 'm-hmtym v'mdy
ytn yhvh lkhm vmts'n mnvchh 'shh byt 'yshh vtshq lhn vtsh'nh qvln vtbkhynh
vt'mrnh-lh khy-'tkh nshvb l'mkh
vt'mr n'my shbnh bnty lmh tlkhnh 'my h'vd-ly bnym bm'y vhyv lkhm l'nshym
shbnh bnty lkhn khy zqnty mhyvt l'ysh khy 'mrty ysh-ly tqvh gm hyyty hlylh l'ysh vgm yldty bnym
hlhn  tshbrnh 'd 'shr ygdlv hlhn t'gnh lblty hyvt l'ysh 'l bnty khy-mr-ly m'd mkhm khy-yts'h by yd-yhvh
vtshnh qvln vtbkhynh 'vd vtshq 'rfh lchmvth vrvt dbqh bh
vt'mr hnh shbh ybmtkh 'l-'mh v'l-'lhyh shvby 'chry ybmtkh
vt'mr rvt 'l-tfg'y-by l'zbkh lshvb m'chrykh khy 'l-'shr tlkhy 'lkh vb'shr tlyny 'lyn 'mkh 'my v'lhykh 'lhy
b'shr tmvty 'mvt vshm 'qbr khh y'shh yhvh ly vkhh ysyf khy hmvt yfryd byny vbynkh
vtr' khy-mt'mtst hy' llkht 'th vtchdl ldbr 'lyh
vtlkhnh shtyhm 'd-b'nh byt lchm vyhy khb'nh byt lchm vthm khl-h'yr 'lyhn vt'mrnh hz't n'my
vt'mr 'lyhn 'l-tqr'nh ly n'my qr'n ly mr' khy-hmr shdy ly m'd
'ny ml'h hlkhty vryqm hshybny yhvh lmh tqr'nh ly n'my vyhvh 'nh by vshdy hr'  ly
vtshb n'my vrvt hmv'byh khlth 'mh hshbh mshdy mv'b vhmh b'v byt lchm btchlt qtsyr sh'rym
vln'my [myd' kh] (mvd' q) l'yshh 'ysh gbvr chyl mmshfcht 'lymlkh vshmv b'z
vt'mr rvt hmv'byh 'l-n'my 'lkhh-n' hshdh v'lqth bshblym 'chr 'shr 'mts'-chn b'ynyv vt'mr lh lkhy bty
vtlkh vtbv' vtlqt bshdh 'chry hqtsrym vyqr mqrh chlqt hshdh lb'z 'shr mmshfcht 'lymlkh
vhnh-b'z b' mbyt lchm vy'mr lqvtsrym yhvh 'mkhm vy'mrv lv ybrkhkh yhvh
vy'mr b'z ln'rv hntsb 'l-hqvtsrym lmy hn'rh hz't
vy'n hn'r hntsb 'l-hqvtsrym vy'mr n'rh mv'byh hy' hshbh 'm-n'my mshdh mv'b
vt'mr 'lqth-n' v'sfty b'mrym 'chry hqvtsrym vtbv' vt'mvd m'z hbqr v'd-'th zh shbth hbyt m't
vy'mr b'z 'l-rvt hlv' shm't bty 'l-tlkhy llqt bshdh 'chr vgm l' t'bvry mzh vkhh tdbqyn 'm-n'rty
'ynykh bshdh 'shr-yqtsrvn vhlkht 'chryhn hlv' tsvyty 't-hn'rym lblty ng'kh vtsmt vhlkht 'l-hkhlym vshtyt m'shr ysh'bvn hn'rym
vtfl 'l-fnyh vtshtchv 'rtsh vt'mr 'lyv mdv' mts'ty chn b'ynykh lhkhyrny v'nkhy nkhryh
vy'n b'z vy'mr lh hgd hgd ly khl 'shr-'shyt 't-chmvtkh 'chry mvt 'yshkh vt'zby 'bykh v'mkh v'rts mvldtkh vtlkhy 'l-'m 'shr l'-yd't tmvl shlshvm
yshlm yhvh f'lkh vthy mshkhrtkh shlmh m'm yhvh 'lhy yshr'l 'shr-b't lchsvt tcht-khnfyv
vt'mr 'mts'-chn b'ynykh 'dny khy nchmtny vkhy dbrt 'l-lb shfchtkh v'nkhy l' 'hyh kh'cht shfchtykh
vy'mr lh b'z l't h'khl gshy hlm v'khlt mn-hlchm vtblt ftkh bchmts vtshb mtsd hqvtsrym vytsbt-lh qly vt'khl vtshb' vttr
vtqm llqt vytsv b'z 't-n'ryv l'mr gm byn h'mrym tlqt vl' tkhlymvh
vgm shl-tshlv lh mn-htsbtym v'zbtm vlqth vl' tg'rv-bh
vtlqt bshdh 'd-h'rb vtchbt 't 'shr-lqth vyhy kh'yfh sh'rym
vtsh' vtbv' h'yr vtr' chmvth 't 'shr-lqth vtvts' vttn-lh 't 'shr-hvtrh mshb'h
vt'mr lh chmvth 'yfh lqtt hyvm v'nh 'shyt yhy mkhyrkh brvkh vtgd lchmvth 't 'shr-'shth 'mv vt'mr shm h'ysh 'shr 'shyty 'mv hyvm b'z
vt'mr n'my lkhlth brvkh hv' lyhvh 'shr l'-'zb chsdv 't-hchyym v't-hmtym vt'mr lh n'my qrvb lnv h'ysh mg'lnv hv'
vt'mr rvt hmv'byh gm  khy-'mr 'ly 'm-hn'rym 'shr-ly tdbqyn 'd 'm-khlv 't khl-hqtsyr 'shr-ly
vt'mr n'my 'l-rvt khlth tvb bty khy tts'y 'm-n'rvtyv vl' yfg'v-bkh bshdh 'chr
vtdbq bn'rvt b'z llqt 'd-khlvt qtsyr-hsh'rym vqtsyr hchtym vtshb 't-chmvth
vt'mr lh n'my chmvth bty hl' 'bqsh-lkh mnvch 'shr yytb-lkh
v'th hl' b'z md'tnv 'shr hyyt 't-n'rvtyv hnh-hv' zrh 't-grn hsh'rym hlylh
vrchtst  vskht vshmt [shmltkh kh] (shmltykh q) 'lykh [vyrdty kh] (vyrdt q) hgrn 'l-tvd'y l'ysh 'd khltv l'khl vlshtvt
vyhy bshkhbv vyd't 't-hmqvm 'shr yshkhb-shm vb't vglyt mrgltyv [vshkhbty kh] (vshkhbt q) vhv' ygyd lkh 't 'shr t'shyn
vt'mr 'lyh khl 'shr-t'mry ('ly q) ''shh
vtrd hgrn vt'sh khkhl 'shr-tsvth chmvth
vy'khl b'z vysht vyytb lbv vyb' lshkhb bqtsh h'rmh vtb' blt vtgl mrgltyv vtshkhb
vyhy bchtsy hlylh vychrd h'ysh vylft vhnh 'shh shkhbt mrgltyv
vy'mr my-'t  vt'mr 'nkhy rvt 'mtkh vfrsht khnfkh 'l-'mtkh khy g'l 'th
vy'mr brvkhh 't lyhvh bty hytbt chsdkh h'chrvn mn-hr'shvn lblty-lkht 'chry hbchvrym 'm-dl v'm-'shyr
v'th bty 'l-tyr'y khl 'shr-t'mry ''shh-lkh khy yvd' khl-sh'r 'my khy 'sht chyl 't
v'th khy 'mnm khy ['m kh] g'l 'nkhy vgm ysh g'l qrvb mmny
lyny  hlylh vhyh bbqr 'm-yg'lkh tvb yg'l v'm-l' ychfts lg'lkh vg'ltykh 'nkhy chy-yhvh shkhby 'd-hbqr
vtshkhb [mrgltv kh] (mrglvtyv  q) 'd-hbqr vtqm [btrvm kh] (btrm q) ykhyr 'ysh 't-r'hv vy'mr 'l-yvd' khy-b'h h'shh hgrn
vy'mr hby hmtfcht 'shr-'lykh v'chzy-bh vt'chz bh vymd shsh-sh'rym vysht 'lyh vyb' h'yr
vtbv' 'l-chmvth vt'mr my-'t bty vtgd-lh 't khl-'shr 'shh-lh h'ysh
vt'mr shsh-hsh'rym h'lh ntn ly khy 'mr ('ly q) 'l-tbv'y ryqm 'l-chmvtkh
vt'mr shby bty 'd 'shr td'yn 'ykh yfl dbr khy l' yshqt h'ysh khy-'m-khlh hdbr hyvm
vb'z 'lh hsh'r vyshb shm vhnh hg'l 'br 'shr dbr-b'z vy'mr svrh shbh-fh flny 'lmny vysr vyshb
vyqch 'shrh 'nshym mzqny h'yr vy'mr shbv-fh vyshbv
vy'mr lg'l chlqt hshdh 'shr l'chynv l'lymlkh mkhrh n'my hshbh mshdh mv'b
v'ny 'mrty 'glh 'znkh l'mr qnh ngd hyshbym  vngd zqny 'my 'm-tg'l g'l v'm-l' yg'l hgydh ly [v'd' kh] (v'd'h q) khy 'yn zvltkh lg'vl v'nkhy 'chrykh vy'mr 'nkhy 'g'l
vy'mr b'z byvm-qnvtkh hshdh myd n'my vm't rvt hmv'byh 'sht-hmt [qnyty kh] (qnyth q) lhqym shm-hmt 'l-nchltv
vy'mr hg'l l' 'vkhl [lg'vl- kh] (lg'l-ly q) fn-'shchyt 't-nchlty g'l-lkh 'th 't-g'lty khy l'-'vkhl lg'l
vz't lfnym byshr'l 'l-hg'vlh v'l-htmvrh lqym khl-dbr shlf 'ysh n'lv vntn lr'hv vz't ht'vdh byshr'l
vy'mr hg'l lb'z qnh-lkh vyshlf n'lv
vy'mr b'z lzqnym vkhl-h'm 'dym 'tm hyvm khy qnyty 't-khl-'shr l'lymlkh v't khl-'shr lkhlyvn vmchlvn myd n'my
vgm 't-rvt hm'byh 'sht mchlvn qnyty ly l'shh lhqym shm-hmt 'l-nchltv vl'-ykhrt shm-hmt m'm 'chyv vmsh'r mqvmv 'dym 'tm hyvm
vy'mrv khl-h'm 'shr-bsh'r vhzqnym 'dym ytn yhvh 't-h'shh hb'h 'l-bytkh khrchl  vkhl'h 'shr bnv shtyhm 't-byt yshr'l v'shh-chyl b'frth vqr'-shm bbyt lchm
vyhy bytkh khbyt frts 'shr-yldh tmr lyhvdh mn-hzr' 'shr ytn yhvh lkh mn-hn'rh hz't
vyqch b'z 't-rvt vthy-lv l'shh vyb' 'lyh vytn yhvh lh hryvn vtld bn
vt'mrnh hnshym 'l-n'my brvkh yhvh 'shr l' hshbyt lkh g'l hyvm vyqr' shmv byshr'l
vhyh lkh lmshyb nfsh vlkhlkhl 't-shybtkh khy khltkh 'shr-'hbtkh yldtv 'shr-hy' tvbh lkh mshb'h bnym
vtqch n'my 't-hyld vtshthv bchyqh vthy-lv l'mnt
vtqr'nh lv hshkhnvt shm l'mr yld-bn ln'my vtqr'nh shmv 'vbd hv' 'by-yshy 'by dvd  f
v'lh tvldvt frts frts hvlyd 't-chtsrvn
vchtsrvn hvlyd 't-rm vrm hvlyd 't-'myndb
v'myndb hvlyd 't-nchshvn vnchshvn hvlyd 't-shlmh
vshlmvn hvlyd 't-b'z vb'z hvlyd 't-'vbd
v'bd hvlyd 't-yshy vyshy hvlyd 't-dvd
